mapper.select: select id, document_id, revision_no, base_revision, session_id, client_seq, op_type, op_position, op_length, op_text, editor_id, editor_name, created_at from collaborative_document_operation where document_id = #{documentId} and revision_no = #{revisionNo} limit 1

select id, document_id, revision_no, base_revision, session_id, client_seq, op_type, op_position, op_length, op_text, editor_id, editor_name, created_at from collaborative_document_operation where document_id = #{documentId} and revision_no > #{fromRevisionExclusive} order by revision_no asc limit #{limit}
